Caffeinate, Connect, and Contribute

Featured Fundraiser

Every Wednesday there will be a new fundraiser.

  • $20 — One month basic needs in ICE detention
  • $240 — One year basic needs in ICE detention
  • $1,000 — Contribute towards bonding someone out of ICE detention (usually $5,000 to $10,000)
  • $12,000 — Fund basic needs for all supported in ICE detention
Go to Beyond Bond Boston Donation Page →
BIJAN Beyond Fund Information

Coffee Featured Actions

Volunteer

3 Types of Orgs in our MA Immigrant Rights Coalition

Community Connection — BIJAN

BIJAN: Support people impacted by ICE detention and deportation.

Website: BeyondBondBoston.org/join

  • Volunteer for accompaniment and support
  • Donate to help pay bonds and basic needs
  • Spread the word and share resources
  • Follow on Instagram and Facebook
  • Contact: bijan.accompaniment@gmail.com or 617-396-7143

About Coffee Connection

The Coffee Connection is part of the weekly Wednesday Bearing Witness events. We offer folks some warm coffee and cocoa, provide an opportunity to connect with us and other organizations, and give everyone a chance to contribute to a good cause.

Each week we feature a different fundraiser and highlight ways to support immigrants - from helping individuals navigate their interactions with ICE, to reining in ICE abuses, to electing leaders who will stand against these cruelties. Look for us at the upcoming Wednesday Bearing Witness events!

Caffeinate, Connect, and Contribute.
